title: Verify Backend Control for Incentive Offer
description: Test that the incentive offer pop-up does NOT appear during the cancellation flow if it is disabled from the backend.
preconditions: User is in an active trial and part of the Trial Corner cohort.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is DISABLED in the backend.

steps.description: 3. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
4. Verify the user is taken directly to the feedback pop-up, SKIPPING the incentive offer.

expected_result: The incentive offer is correctly suppressed based on the backend configuration. The cancellation flow proceeds without the offer step.
